explanations.8: This is a special comment marker used by documentation tools to highlight the next line for readers.
explanations.20: The ** means any folder at any depth, and *.*proj.user matches Visual Studio project user files at any location.
explanations.25: This is another documentation highlight marker for the line that follows it.
explanations.27: The exclamation mark means 'actually, DO copy this file' — it undoes the ignore rule from line 24.
explanations.30: This ignores all Dockerfile variations (like Dockerfile.prod, Dockerfile.dev, etc.) at any folder level.
